form.formComment: Debutant by My Redeemer from Chatty Mavis. From the D Fahey & K Wyllie kennel. Won a trial (17.21) on this track over 295m. Market to provide the best guide to his chances.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Homebush Quinn at Ascot Park last start over 390m (23.47). Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: First starter by Aston Rupee from Seductive Kiwi. From the L H Anderton kennel. Ran third in a four dog trial (17.21) on this track over 295m. Strong market watch.

form.formComment: Ran nicely on debut when jumped well and raced on pace, holding on to finish second (17.42) at this track over 295m. Shouldn't be a maiden long.

formComments.comment: Ran nicely on debut when jumped well and raced on pace, holding on to finish second (17.42) at this track over 295m. Shouldn't be a maiden long.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 4th on April 15 over 390m at Ascot Park behind Homebush Quinn beaten 7 lengths (23.54) in a Class 0. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Class 0 H on March 13 over 295m at this track behind Homebush Tommy, beaten 6 lengths (17.81). Must be included.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 6 length sixth over 390m at Ascot Park. Tested under these conditions.

Contacted rounding bend, shifted wider and lost ground.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on April 10 over 295m at this track behind Rocking Rory, beaten 16 lengths (18.45) in a Class 0. Harder here and others preferred this time.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 295m at this track. Can't recommend in this field.
